text.title: Ads Attribution Models Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Always start at root-question; conclusions reference rule ids.

decision-tree.root-question: Do the AGENTS.md applicability preconditions hold for this case?

conclusion.verdict: set 15% threshold + named reviewer before any budget decision

branch.when: channels_active >= 2 AND warehouse == 'present' AND variance_threshold == 'defined' AND incrementality_test == 'never'

conclusion.verdict: schedule quarterly geo-holdout per major channel

branch.when: channels_active >= 2 AND warehouse == 'present' AND variance_threshold == 'defined' AND incrementality_test == 'planned'

conclusion.verdict: ship config + reconciliation pipeline + weekly variance report

example.trace: channels_active >= 2 AND warehouse == 'present' AND variance_threshold == 'defined' AND incrementality_test == 'planned' → conclusion ref="warehouse-truth" verdict="ship config + reconciliation pipeline + weekly variance report"

text.example: Reading: evaluate the named observable; follow the matching branch; apply the rule the conclusion references.
